name: 03-16-frontend-style-system
title: Frontend unified style management
description: Design and stage a unified frontend style management system based on design tokens, theme layers, and shared UI primitives for the Vue workspace.
creator: zquant
notes: Completed. Implemented unified style management system with three layers (tokens/theme/components). Created design tokens, dark theme, shared UI primitives. Migrated JobsTab and LeftSidebar. Added Ant Design Vue bridge (antd-theme.ts + ConfigProvider). Known limitation: antd bridge uses manual alignment, not single token source. Build pass. REVIEW: PASS (with known limitations).
